name: Unblock Me Car
short_description: There is chaos in the parking lot. You will need your wits to unleash this logic puzzle to arrange cars to make way for emergency vehicles!
detailed_description:
There is chaos in the parking lot. You will need to be smart to arrange the cars in this logic puzzle to make way for emergency vehicles!



This game will challenge you!
Difficult levels will not let you get bored, but if the solution does not come, you can always use the hint.

Features of the game Unblock:
- 3 Locations (fire truck, police car, ambulance)
- 384 levels
- 2 tips for each level

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
